def: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX consent_records_pkey ON public.consent_records USING btree (id)
CREATE INDEX consent_records_request_idx ON public.consent_records USING btree (request_id)
CREATE INDEX consent_records_user_created_idx ON public.consent_records USING btree (user_id, created_at DESC)

CREATE INDEX estimate_requests_service_created_idx ON public.estimate_requests USING btree (service_slug, created_at DESC)

CREATE UNIQUE INDEX estimate_requests_submission_id_key ON public.estimate_requests USING btree (submission_id)
CREATE INDEX estimate_requests_user_created_idx ON public.estimate_requests USING btree (user_id, created_at DESC)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX profiles_pkey ON public.profiles USING btree (id)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX project_documents_pkey ON public.project_documents USING btree (id)
CREATE INDEX project_documents_project_created_idx ON public.project_documents USING btree (project_id, created_at DESC)
